Who We Are

FEEDING PROGRAMS.
FUELING COMMUNITIES.

Wholesome Plates Catering LLC is an Atlanta-based food service company built around one thing: keeping kids and teens fed through federally compliant meal programs that actually taste good.

We partner with nonprofits and schools operating CACFP and SFSP programs across metro Atlanta, delivering hot, scratch-cooked meals with the documentation and reliability your program depends on.

500+
Meals Per Day
5+
Active Sites
3+
Years Operating
SCRATCH COOKED
EVERY TIME
What We Do

FULL SERVICE.
ZERO GAPS.

01
CACFP Meal Service

Daily breakfast and lunch delivery to child care centers and family day care homes. All meals meet USDA nutrition standards with full documentation for reimbursement.

02
Summer Food Service (SFSP)

Summer meal service for nonprofit enrichment sites across metro Atlanta. We bring the food, the compliance, and the accountability — you focus on the program.

03
Institutional Catering

Hot, scratch-cooked meals with full setup and service for schools, nonprofits, and program partners. Menu variety across pasta, proteins, salads, and seasonal sides.

Compliance & Documentation
Why It Matters

COMPLIANCE IS THE
FOUNDATION, NOT AN
AFTERTHOUGHT.

Every site we serve has the paperwork to prove it. Meal counts, menus, attendance logs — we maintain audit-ready documentation so your program never has to worry.

We built our business inside the regulatory landscape. We know what CACFP auditors look for because we operate in it every single day.

📋
CACFP Compliant

All meals meet USDA Child and Adult Care Food Program nutritional standards.

☀️
SFSP Certified

Certified for Summer Food Service at nonprofit summer enrichment sites.

📁
Audit-Ready Records

Meal counts, menus, and attendance sheets maintained for every service day.

🚚
Daily Hot Delivery

Reliable on-time delivery to multiple sites across metro Atlanta — every day.
